title: A question about the platinum collection
display_title: A question about the platinum collection
wikitext:
[]: A question about the platinum collection.             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed Oct 09, 2013 10:45 am Is it supposed to have 6 or 7 DVDs? I'm looking to purchase this soon, but I have no idea how many discs it should have.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Oct 09, 2013 10:50 am There are different packagings, 7 disks with or 6 disks without the extras. I think the video is essentially the same (though I have seen someone say that the 6-DVD version without extras actually has a higher data rate).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 09, 2013 1:03 pm pwhodges wrote: I have seen someone say that the 6-DVD version without extras actually has a higher data rate
